description_long: This is a compact, freestanding wooden desk or vanity with a light gray finish and a modern, minimalist design. The front features two small drawers with round metallic knobs, providing storage space for small items. The back of the desk rises into a double-panel backboard, with the upper section incorporating two open cubby shelves for organizing books or accessories. The side panels are solid and extend to the floor, giving the piece a sturdy appearance. The top surface is flat and spacious enough to support a computer, books, or decorative items. The overall construction suggests it is suitable for use in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or dorm rooms.
description: A light gray wooden desk or vanity with two drawers, a double-panel backboard, and open cubby shelves. It features a modern, minimalist design with metallic drawer knobs and a flat top surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with round knobs and the double-panel backboard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the open cubby shelves on the backboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panels and the overall height of the backboard.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the open cubby shelves and the flat top surface.
